name: Al-Lisan
description: The Tongue — 10 articulation points producing 18 letters

rules.description: Back of the tongue touching the soft palate
Back of the tongue touching the hard palate, slightly forward from Qaf
Middle of the tongue touching the hard palate
Side of the tongue touching the upper molars — unique to Arabic
Tip of the tongue touching the gums above the front teeth
Tip of the tongue touching the gum area just below where Lam is articulated
Tip of the tongue touching the gums behind the upper front teeth with a slight trill
Tip of the tongue touching the base of the upper front teeth
Tip of the tongue touching the edge of the upper front teeth
Tip of the tongue near the lower front teeth with air passing through
